aboutMe.responsibilitiesChoose: What to see the responsibilities choose a position from a column of experience
aboutMe.aboutMeInformation: Fullstack developer with 4 years of hands-on experience. Grew from junior at BIV to middle at Selsup, then moved into freelancing and building my own products. Single-handedly designed and launched an app on Play Market — from Figma to deployment. I build both websites and mobile apps — I care about the product, not the platform. Currently looking for a team or startup: I want to tackle more complex challenges and grow alongside experienced colleagues, rather than hitting the ceiling of solo development.
